review_view_error: The saved view could not be changed. Check its name and try again.
review_empty: Nothing needs attention in this view.
review_empty_hint: Choose another state, server, library, or search term.
review_action_failed: The review action failed. Nothing was applied.
review_apply_next_confirm: Apply via {target}, wait for completion, then open the next item?
review_apply_next_selection_changed: Staging changed while the job was running. Nothing was cleared; review this item before continuing.
review_apply_next_not_verified: Not every selected target was applied and verified. You are staying on this item.
review_apply_next_completion_failed: The artwork job succeeded, but the review could not be finalized. Stay here and try again.
review_apply_next_completed: Applied and verified. Opening the next item…
review_apply_next_skipped: {count} selected targets were skipped. You are staying here to review them.
review_apply_next_stayed: The job ended as {status}. You are staying here; inspect the failed targets and retry only that work.
review_apply_next_preview_skips: This preview contains {count} skipped targets. Resolve them or use regular Apply; Apply and next cannot be confirmed.
review_apply_next_preview_incomplete: This preview has no complete set of actionable targets. Review the staging or use regular Apply.
server_switcher_failed: The active server could not be changed. Try again.
server_manager_hint: Name, test, and switch between media servers without mixing their libraries or credentials.
server_manager_credential_new_hint: Enter a {server} token or API key. It is encrypted before storage.
server_manager_credential_edit_hint: Leave blank to keep the stored credential.
server_manager_disconnect_hint: Disconnect {name}? Its scoped history is retained, but the stored credential is removed.
server_manager_empty: No media server is connected yet.
server_manager_disconnected: Server disconnected and its credential removed.
server_manager_error_invalid_name: Enter a valid, unique server name.
server_manager_error_invalid_url: Enter a valid HTTP or HTTPS server address.
server_manager_error_credential_required: Enter the server access token or API key.
server_manager_error_duplicate_name: Another connected server already uses this name.
server_manager_error_unauthorized: The server rejected this credential. Check it and try again.
server_manager_error_unreachable: PosterPilot could not reach this server. Check its address and network access.
server_manager_error_disabled: Enable this server before making it active.
server_manager_error_disconnected: This server has been disconnected and can no longer be changed.
server_manager_error_protected: This default connection is managed by the legacy settings below.
server_purge_description: Review the exact stored data that will be removed from PosterPilot.
server_purge_irreversible: This cannot be undone from PosterPilot.
server_purge_scope_only: Only data owned by this disconnected server is deleted. Other servers remain isolated and unchanged.
server_purge_total: {count} stored records will be removed in total.
server_purge_jobs_blocked: Deletion is blocked while {count} mutating jobs are active. Wait for them to finish or cancel them first.
server_purge_backup_hint: Create and export a backup first if you may need this history later.
server_purge_completed: {name} and its scoped data were permanently deleted.
server_purge_completed_with_cleanup: The server data was deleted, but one or more unreferenced snapshot files need manual cleanup.
server_purge_error_disconnect_first: Disconnect this server before requesting permanent deletion.
server_purge_error_active_jobs: Permanent deletion is blocked while mutating jobs are active for this server.
server_purge_error_stale: The stored data changed or this preview expired. Review a fresh deletion preview.
server_manager_legacy_settings_hint: Keep using these familiar fields for the original server. Additional named servers are managed above.
banner_configure: Configure your media server and TMDB in Settings to get started.
dashboard_next_actions_hint: Start with the decisions and exceptions that need attention on this server.
dashboard_action_partial_failure: Inspect failed targets and retry only the remaining work.
dashboard_action_external_change: Compare the server artwork and accept or replace it.
dashboard_action_unresolved: Correct the TMDB match before looking for artwork.
dashboard_action_staged: Preview the exact plan, confirm it, and verify the result.
dashboard_action_suggestions: Compare ranked artwork and explicitly stage your choice.
dashboard_action_no_candidates: Retry discovery or acknowledge titles without results.
dashboard_failed_jobs_hint: Open activity for error details and available retries.
dashboard_all_clear_hint: Synchronize the library to check for new work.
dashboard_sync_already_active: A sync for this server is already queued or running.
dashboard_sync_failed: The sync could not be started. Try again.
dashboard_full_rescan_confirm_hint: A full rescan reconciles every item and current artwork, flags artwork changed on the server for review, preserves originals and history, and never applies artwork automatically.
dashboard_no_jobs: No jobs yet. Run a sync to populate your library.
library_select_all_failed: Could not materialize all matching results. Try again.
library_selection_changed: The matching result set changed. Review it and select all again.
library_empty: No items. Configure a media server in Settings and run a sync from the Dashboard.
item_history_hint: Verified server and Kometa changes are kept independently.
item_history_error: Artwork history could not be loaded.
item_history_empty: No artwork changes have been recorded yet.
item_history_operation_failed: This destination did not complete successfully.
item_undo_dialog_description: Review the frozen changes for {scope}. Nothing is changed until you confirm.
item_undo_restore_absent: Remove artwork to restore an empty slot
item_undo_unavailable_warning: {count} changes cannot be restored and will be skipped.
item_undo_history_preserved: This creates a new history entry. Existing artwork history is never deleted.
item_undo_partial: Some artwork was restored, but one or more destinations need attention.
item_undo_failed: Artwork could not be restored safely.
item_undo_stale: The artwork changed after this preview. Review a fresh undo preview before trying again.
item_no_metadata: No TMDB metadata yet — re-sync the library to enrich this item.
item_msg_applied_skipped: Applied — {count} skipped (no matching season/episode on the server)
item_msg_applied_partial: Applied with errors — {count} season/episode upload(s) failed
item_no_candidates_resolved: No candidates yet. Click “Find covers” to search the enabled providers.
item_no_candidates_unresolved: No candidates yet. This item has no resolved TMDB id, so providers cannot be searched.
item_upload_preview_summary: Ready to upload {size} MB to the media server.
item_msg_upload_preview_ready: Upload preview ready — confirm to write and verify this exact file.
item_upload_hint: Uploads require a preview and apply to the media server only. URLs can apply to the server + Kometa.
item_msg_set_staged: Set staged — review below, then Apply.
item_msg_uploaded: Poster uploaded to the media server.
item_msg_reverted: Reverted to the original server poster.
item_msg_stage_first: Stage at least one artwork slot first.
jobs_cancel_failed: The cancellation request could not be sent.
jobs_hidden_failures: {count} additional failures are not shown here.
jobs_retry_error: The failed work could not be retried.
jobs_error_provider_discovery: Artwork discovery failed for this target.
jobs_error_sync_item: This title could not be synchronized.
events_clear_confirm: Clear the entire activity log? This cannot be undone.
settings_plex_login_hint: Sign in to connect your server.
settings_plex_tab_waiting: Finish signing in to Plex in the new tab. Waiting for authorization…
settings_plex_tab_blocked: Couldn't open a new tab. Use the code below to finish signing in.
settings_plex_pin_expired: The Plex code expired. Try again.
settings_plex_login_failed: Couldn't start Plex sign-in. Try again.
settings_plex_discovery_failed: Couldn't find Plex servers. Check the connection and try again.
settings_login_hint: Sign in with your {server} username and password.
settings_login_missing_fields: Enter a server URL and username.
settings_login_failed: Couldn't sign in to {server}. Check the address and credentials.
settings_tmdb_key: TMDB key (v3 key or v4 JWT)
settings_kometa_manager_pointer: Manage Kometa's own config.yml in the
settings_kometa_server_hint: Kometa is Plex-only. Every preview and write stays bound to this exact server and never borrows another server's credentials.
settings_artwork_ranking_hint: Order providers for deterministic tie-breaking and tune the bounded weights used by suggestions and exact apply previews.
settings_score_range: Weights accept values from 0 to 10. Invalid stored values fall back to safe defaults.
settings_performance_hint: Tune how PosterPilot applies artwork and caches thumbnails.
settings_suggest_preselect: Pre-select the best-scored artwork as a suggestion
settings_incremental_sync: Only re-scan items changed on the server
settings_fun_enabled: Enable the Fun section (experiments like the random picker)
settings_libraries_connect_first: Connect a server and save to choose libraries.
settings_libraries_hint: Uncheck any you don't want synced.
whats_new_empty: No release notes are available for this version.
library_no_match: No items match the current view.
diagnostics_intro: Check each connection and local path without changing artwork, media metadata, or Kometa configuration.
diagnostics_hint_credential_missing: Add the required credential in Settings, save it, and run the check again.
diagnostics_hint_credential_rejected: Replace the rejected credential, then test the connection again.
diagnostics_hint_timeout: The check reached its time limit. Confirm the address and network route, then retry.
diagnostics_hint_network: Confirm the service address and that PosterPilot can reach it from this host.
diagnostics_hint_path_missing: Create or mount this path, then run the check again.
diagnostics_hint_path_type: Update the path so it points to the expected file or directory type.
diagnostics_hint_path_unreadable: Grant the PosterPilot process read access to this path.
diagnostics_hint_path_unwritable: Grant write access to this path; no existing file was overwritten by the check.
diagnostics_hint_generic: Review the component configuration and run the check again.
diagnostics_run_partial: Diagnostics completed with items that need attention.
diagnostics_run_failed: Diagnostics could not be completed. Please try again.
diagnostics_no_history: No diagnostic runs have been recorded yet.
diagnostics_support_intro: The archive contains bounded diagnostics, job states, provider outcomes, migration state, and configuration shape. Credentials, database contents, artwork, and raw provider responses are excluded.
diagnostics_support_titles_warning: Titles are personal library data. Leave this off unless support specifically needs them.
diagnostics_support_failed: The support bundle could not be created. Try again.
diagnostics_support_ready: The redacted support bundle is ready.
manual_match_current_unresolved: This title is not matched to TMDB.
manual_match_error_invalid: Enter a valid title and optional four-digit year.
manual_match_error_not_found: This media item no longer exists on the selected server.
manual_match_error_not_configured: Add a TMDB credential in Settings before searching.
manual_match_error_candidate_unavailable: TMDB could not confirm this candidate. Search again and choose another result.
manual_match_error_unavailable: TMDB is temporarily unavailable. Your current match was not changed.
manual_match_error_pin_missing: There is no manual match to clear.
manual_match_error_generic: The match could not be updated. Your current match was not changed.
manual_match_empty: No TMDB results matched this search. Try a different title, year, or type.
manual_match_confirm_hint: Artwork candidates from the previous identity will be retired. No artwork is applied automatically.
manual_match_saved: TMDB match saved. Find covers again to discover artwork for this identity.
manual_match_clear_hint: The item becomes eligible for automatic GUID matching again. Old artwork candidates stay retired.
manual_match_cleared_resolved: Manual match cleared and an automatic GUID match was restored.
manual_match_cleared_unresolved: Manual match cleared, but the stored GUIDs did not resolve to TMDB.
manual_match_cleared_eligible: Manual match cleared. Automatic matching will retry during synchronization.
manual_match_no_history: No resolution decisions have been recorded yet.
kometa_config_path_hint: Absolute path to Kometa's own config.yml. PosterPilot reads it, updates only the sections it manages, and writes it back — your other keys and comments are preserved. Leave blank to disable.
kometa_config_relative_warning: That's a relative path — in Docker it resolves against the app's working directory (/app), not your mounted volume. Use an absolute path such as /kometa/config.yml.
kometa_setup_hint: Save the path to enable config syncing.
kometa_metadata_path_hint: Folder where Kometa finds posterpilot.yml. Defaults to the Kometa assets directory; override it when PosterPilot and Kometa mount that folder at different paths.
kometa_plex_only_note: Kometa manages Plex only. Connection data always comes from the named Plex server shown above.
kometa_binding_missing: Choose a named Plex server in Settings before previewing or writing Kometa configuration.
kometa_binding_incompatible: The configured Kometa server is not Plex. Choose a named Plex server in Settings.
kometa_binding_unavailable: The Plex server bound to Kometa is disabled, disconnected, or missing credentials. Fix that exact server before continuing.
kometa_save_header_first: Save the path and management mode before creating a preview.
kometa_diff_truncated: This large diff is shortened for display. Confirmation remains bound to the complete file.
kometa_parse_error: Could not parse config.yml: {error}. No changes were written.
kometa_will_scaffold: No config.yml found at that path yet — a minimal one will be created on first sync.
kometa_missing_plex_creds: The Plex server bound to Kometa is unavailable or missing credentials.
kometa_libraries_hint: PosterPilot will ensure these libraries in config.yml and wire posterpilot.yml in as a metadata file.
kometa_no_libraries: No libraries yet — connect a server and sync on the Media server tab first.
kometa_defaults_hint: Toggle Kometa's built-in collection sets for this library. Your own collection files are left untouched.
kometa_settings_hint: Optional. Leave a field blank to stop managing it (PosterPilot removes the key it previously set).
kometa_secrets_note: Heads up: Kometa needs your Plex token and TMDB key in plaintext, so they are written into config.yml (and its backups) on disk.
kometa_preview_none: No changes — config.yml already matches your selections.
kometa_request_failed: Request failed. Check the path and try again.
kometa_mode_merge_hint: PosterPilot updates only the sections it manages and leaves everything else — including your own keys and comments — untouched.
kometa_mode_own_hint: PosterPilot regenerates the whole config.yml from its settings on every sync. Keys it does not manage are removed.
kometa_mode_own_warning: Own mode replaces the entire file — any keys you added by hand will be dropped (a backup is still written first).
kometa_raw_hint: Edit the full config.yml, preview the exact redacted diff, then confirm. A backup is written before the confirmed replacement.
kometa_backups_none: No backups yet — one is written automatically before each change.
kometa_consistency_warning: {library}: “{feature}” needs the {connector} connector, which isn't configured.
setup_step_server_desc: Connect the server that hosts your library.
setup_step_tmdb_desc: Used to match titles and pull metadata.
setup_step_providers_desc: Pick the sources searched for covers.
setup_step_libraries_desc: Confirm the connection and choose which libraries to sync.
setup_libraries_not_connected: Couldn't reach your media server — check the previous step.
setup_libraries_check_hint: Refresh to confirm the connection and load your libraries.
setup_step_sync_desc: Import your library to finish setup.
setup_done: All set! Your library is importing.
footer_disclaimer: Not affiliated with or endorsed by Plex, Jellyfin, Emby, TMDB, MediUX, Fanart.tv, or ThePosterDB. Trademarks belong to their owners.
library_apply_confirm: Apply auto-picked covers to {count} items? This writes to your library.
library_action_failed: Something went wrong. Your selection was kept — try again.
item_apply_confirm: Apply the staged artwork to {target}? This overwrites the current artwork.
settings_invalid_weight: {field} must be a number from 0 to 10.
settings_save_failed: Couldn't save settings. Please try again.
settings_test_failed: Couldn't run the connection test. Please try again.
setup_need_server: Connect your media server before continuing.
setup_need_tmdb: Enter your TMDB key before continuing.
setup_skip_failed: Could not save your setup choice: {error}
setup_sync_failed: Could not start the first sync: {error}
setup_sync_terminal_failed: The sync ended with status “{status}”. Your progress is safe; retry when ready.
fun_picker_subtitle: Let PosterPilot pick a random movie or show from your library.
fun_empty: Nothing in your library matches these filters. Loosen them and try again.
fun_hub_subtitle: Quiet, cinematic experiments for rediscovering the library you already own.
fun_shared_choice_unavailable: A choice in this shared result is no longer available. The remaining choices were not replaced.
fun_fix_filters: Review the highlighted filter fields before choosing.
fun_error_range: This value is outside the available range.
fun_error_order: The minimum cannot be greater than the maximum.
fun_session_subtitle: Choose two or three movies that fit the time you actually have.
fun_session_invalid_budget: Enter a time between 30 minutes and 24 hours.
fun_session_not_enough: There are not enough movies with known runtimes for this plan.
fun_session_no_fit: No combination fits inside this time budget.
fun_session_adjust: Try adding time, choosing fewer movies, or loosening the filters.
fun_match_subtitle: Choose with your eyes. The winning poster is staged for review, never applied automatically.
fun_match_no_items: No title has enough poster candidates for a match yet.
fun_match_stage_hint: Staging changes only the pending poster and preserves every other artwork slot.
fun_match_unavailable: The remaining images were unavailable. Restart or choose another title.
fun_gallery_subtitle: Let your library artwork fill the room, with calm controls and no automatic changes.
automation_intro: Run durable sync and discovery on a schedule or media event, then make every artwork decision in the review inbox.
automation_review_only_hint: Automations never apply artwork. They stop after syncing and discovering work for review.
automation_action_hint: Artwork remains unchanged until you review and confirm a separate exact apply plan.
automation_libraries_hint: Choose one or more libraries on this server.
automation_updated: Automation updated. Already queued work keeps its original inputs.
automation_error_duplicate: Another automation on this server already uses that name.
automation_error_scope: A selected server, library, or review view is no longer available.
automation_error_invalid: Review the highlighted schedule values and try again.
automation_error_generic: The automation request could not be completed. Try again.
automation_empty: No review automations are configured for this server.
automation_delete_hint: This removes the automation and its occurrence history. It does not remove review items or artwork history.
automation_history_empty: No automation occurrences have run yet.
automation_failure_summary: Some work needs attention. Sensitive details are hidden.
automation_retry_error: The failed work could not be retried. Inspect the job and try again.
automation_webhook_once_hint: It is shown only once. Send it in the named header when posting events to the endpoint.
automation_webhook_created: Webhook token created. The previous token, if any, is no longer valid.
automation_webhook_error: The webhook setting could not be changed. Try again.
backup_intro: Create, verify, export, and restore managed PosterPilot snapshots. Restores are staged only after a complete safety check.
backup_restart_hint: The verified restore is staged and PosterPilot is in maintenance mode. Restart the process or container to apply it. The previous database remains available for automatic rollback until readiness checks pass.
maintenance_banner: Maintenance mode: a verified restore is staged. Changes are disabled until PosterPilot is restarted.
backup_restore_prepared: Restore prepared. Restart PosterPilot to apply it.
backup_retention_hint: Only unprotected scheduled backups are pruned. Manual and pre-restore safety backups stay protected.
backup_empty: No application backups have been created yet.
backup_export_warning: This bundle may contain server credentials, provider API keys, and an application encryption key. Store and share it as a secret.
backup_delete_warning: This removes the managed backup bundle permanently.
backup_delete_protected_warning: This backup is protected because it is manual or needed for restore safety. Confirm again only if you no longer need that recovery point.
backup_restore_preview_hint: Review the exact replacement scope, schema, encryption key, disk space, and external-path warnings before continuing.
backup_restore_migrations: {count} database migrations will run during startup.
backup_restore_block_bundle: The bundle or one of its checksums is invalid.
backup_restore_block_database: The backup database cannot be read safely or failed its integrity check.
backup_restore_block_schema: The backup schema is missing, incomplete, or incompatible with this installation.
backup_restore_block_newer: This backup was created by a newer PosterPilot schema.
backup_restore_block_key: The application encryption key is missing, mismatched, or incompatible.
backup_restore_block_path: A required local restore path is not writable.
backup_restore_block_space: There is not enough confirmed local space for a safe restore.
backup_restore_warning_permissions: Review the restored bundle permissions after startup.
backup_restore_warning_external: The external location for {component} is not included and must remain available.
backup_restore_confirmation_warning: I understand that PosterPilot will enter maintenance mode, finish already accepted work, create a protected safety backup, and stage this exact restore for the next restart. PosterPilot will not restart itself, and the previous database is kept until post-restore readiness checks pass.
backup_history_empty: No restore attempts have been recorded.
backup_error_retention: The retention policy could not be saved. Check the values and try again.
backup_error_restore: The restore request could not be completed. Run a new safety check before trying again.
backup_error_export: The backup could not be exported.
backup_error_delete: The backup could not be deleted.
backup_error_validation: The backup could not be verified.
backup_error_create: The backup could not be created.
collections_intro: Review franchises and server collections as visual sets. Coverage is based only on local members and recorded artwork evidence; PosterPilot never changes artwork from this view.
collections_empty_hint: Collections appear after a sync finds at least two local members with the same source-qualified TMDB franchise or native collection.
collection_review_only_hint: This is a review-only consistency workspace. It shows current and staged evidence but does not apply, replace, or clear artwork.
collection_local_members_hint: Only titles available on the selected server count toward consistency coverage.
collection_no_local_members: No local members are currently available for this collection.
collection_unavailable_hint: These source members are not available in the selected server's synced libraries. They remain visible for context and are excluded from selection and coverage.
collection_apply_hint: Create an exact member-by-member preview, then confirm it as one revisioned collection job.
collection_apply_nothing_staged: Stage artwork for at least one member before creating a preview.
collection_apply_stale: Collection membership or staged artwork changed. Create a new preview.
collection_apply_no_members: This collection has no available local members.
collection_apply_conflict: Another job is already changing this collection scope.
collection_apply_error: The collection operation could not be completed. Try again.
collection_apply_confirm_hint: Only the listed member slots and destinations will be written. Independent members continue after a partial failure.
collection_history_hint: Each confirmed action keeps its member revisions and immutable prior artwork.
collection_history_empty: No coordinated collection action has completed yet.
collection_undo_partial: Restored {succeeded} slots; {failed} could not be restored.
collection_undo_error: The collection action could not be restored. Refresh the preview and try again.
collection_consistency_hint: The dominant family uses only recorded provider plus design-family or set evidence. Unknown provenance and missing artwork stay separate from known mismatches.
collection_consistency_coverage: {covered} of {total} local members match the dominant reviewed family ({percent}%).
collection_consistency_excluded: {count} unavailable members are shown as context and excluded from this coverage.
collection_suggestion_hint: Suggestions require shared, recorded provider evidence across at least two local members. Coverage ranks first, then the configured artwork score. Staging only changes pending selections and never applies artwork.
collection_suggestion_stage_hint: Uncovered slots and every unrelated pending selection stay unchanged.
collection_suggestion_staged: Staged {slots} slots across {members} members. Nothing was applied.
collection_suggestion_stale: This suggestion changed after it was shown. Review the refreshed coverage before staging.
collection_suggestion_failed: The selection could not be staged. No artwork was applied.
collection_suggestion_no_common_hint: Candidates exist, but their provider, curator, set, design-family, or language evidence does not establish one shared family across at least two local members. Review members individually instead.
collection_suggestion_no_candidates_hint: Discover artwork from the member detail pages, then return here to review coordinated coverage.
collection_override_no_candidates: No eligible candidates are available for this slot.
collection_override_staged: Override staged for {title}. Nothing was applied.
native_collection_hint: Manage the poster and background on the media server's collection container through an exact preview, verification, revisions, and undo.
native_collection_member_unaffected: Native capability affects only this container. Coordinated member artwork remains available.
native_collection_entity_not_native: This source-qualified record has no native server container.
native_collection_entity_provider_unknow: The native provider identity is unavailable.
native_collection_entity_server_unavaila: The selected media server could not be reached.
native_collection_entity_scope_mismatch: The native container does not belong to the selected server binding.
native_collection_candidates_identity_in: Collection candidates require at least two local members linked to the same TMDB collection.
native_collection_candidates_provider_un: TMDB collection artwork is temporarily unavailable or not configured.
native_collection_candidates_empty: No eligible collection artwork candidates were found.
native_collection_capability_unsupported: This server cannot write the native {slot} slot.
native_collection_capability_unknown: Support for the native {slot} slot could not be verified.
native_collection_current_unavailable: The current {slot} could not be read safely, so this slot cannot be planned.
native_collection_preview_no_writes: No native-container write is safe with the selected slots. Member artwork is unchanged.
native_collection_apply_success: Native collection artwork was applied and verified.
native_collection_history_empty: No native collection artwork revision has completed yet.
login_error_locked: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
security_intro: Optionally require a login to access PosterPilot. Off by default.
security_env_locked: The authentication mode is locked by the AUTH_MODE environment variable.
security_mode_local_hint: Require a login except for local-network addresses.
security_mode_enabled_hint: Require a login for every request.
security_password_hint: Leave blank to keep the current password.
